briefs.title: Council to vote on Burnaby's five-year financial plan covering 2026 to 2030
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council is set to vote on a proposed bylaw that would adopt the city's five-year financial plan for 2026–2030, outlining how the city plans to raise and spend money each year. The plan projects total revenues rising from roughly $873M in 2026 to over $1B by 2030, with property taxes remaining the largest funding source at 44.8% of 2026 revenue.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the council vote — rising property taxes and fees could affect your business costs.

key_dates.label: Burnaby 2026–2030 Financial Plan Bylaw — council adoption vote

briefs.industries: Landlord & Property Mgmt, Construction & Development, Retail
